title: Ten Key Test - Data Entry Assessment | Criteria
text:
Ten Key Test - Data Entry Assessment | Criteria

Test Description

Test DescriptionThe Ten Key Test measures an individual's ability to perform data entry for numerical fields. The test provides both a speed score (keystrokes per hour) and an accuracy score (number of correct fields). The test consists of 20 entries, and typically takes less than 5 minutes to complete, including instructions.Book a Demo
